prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap stocks, assuming an annualized volatility of approximately 25-30%. The point estimate reflects minimal expected drift over the short 20-day period. Confidence intervals are calculated using standard statistical methods for stock price movements, with wider intervals reflecting greater uncertainty at higher confidence levels. The relatively narrow ranges reflect the short time horizon, though individual stock movements can be highly unpredictable.
